name: Lupa
description: AI-native veterinary OS replacing 7+ point solutions
thesis: Massive TAM in underdigitised $350B pet care market. 50x revenue growth seed to A. Regulatory complexity in veterinary creates defensible moat.

name: Wexler
description: AI fact intelligence for complex litigation
investors: Pear VC, Seedcamp, Myriad Venture Partners, The LegalTech Fund
thesis: Real-time fact-checking in depositions. Clifford Chance, Goodwin, HSF Kramer as clients. 20x ARR growth. Regulatory complexity in legal creates exit barriers.

name: La Fraise
description: French patisserie brand scaling artisan model

name: Pure Poker
description: Zero-rake real-money poker with gaming-native monetisation
investors: Z Fellows, Triumph Arcade CEO, Point72 & A-Star (evaluating)
thesis: Gaming-native monetisation (battle passes, skins, AI coaching) in regulated wagering. Compliance moat via CLEAR/Radar/PayPal/Apple Pay. Legal in 30+ states under skill-based classification. $8M balance sheet, 6-person team, ~$50M seed valuation. chess.com-for-poker thesis.

name: Didero
description: Agentic AI layer for manufacturing procurement
thesis: Automates supplier comms, order tracking, exception handling inside existing ERPs. $37M Series A led by Chemistry.

name: Nixtla
description: Foundation model for time series forecasting
thesis: 45M+ open-source downloads. Enterprise clients inc. Microsoft, Zalando, Decathlon. Open-source moat with enterprise conversion.

name: Accrual
description: AI-native accounting platform incubated by General Catalyst
investors: General Catalyst (Creation), Pruven Capital, Edward Jones Ventures
thesis: 85% reduction in prep time, 60% in review time. H&R Block, Armanino as early customers. GC Creation incubated.

name: Avantos.ai
description: AI-native OS for financial services client onboarding
thesis: Knowledge graph architecture for wealth management. Mercer Advisors, Vanguard as customers. $35M Series A from tier-1 investors.

name: Complyance
description: AI agents for governance, risk & compliance
thesis: 16 purpose-built agents automating manual GRC workflows. Enterprise-grade. GV-backed at Series A.

name: Cogent Security
description: AI taskforce for vulnerability management
thesis: 97% reduction in exposure windows. Fortune 500 customers. Greylock Edge incubated. $53M Series A.

name: Purple Transform
description: AI video analytics for rail safety and critical infrastructure
thesis: SiYtE platform across 900+ cameras. Trespass detection, suicide prevention. Expanding to ports & CNI.

name: Vizgard
description: Edge-based visual AI for defence and surveillance
investors: Sure Valley Ventures, Midwich Ignite, Focal
thesis: FortifAI platform for drones, counter-UAS, surveillance. MOD & Home Office contracts. NATO DIANA selected.

name: Orca.AI
description: Autonomous shipping navigation platform
investors: Brighton Park Capital, Ankona, OCV Partners
thesis: 1,200+ vessels booked. World's largest marine visual dataset (80M nautical miles). MSC, NYK, Seaspan customers.

name: Hypatos
description: Deep learning for financial document automation
investors: Blackfin Tech, UVC Partners, Framework Ventures
thesis: 99%+ automation rate. Gartner Challenger for IDP. Processing $103B in annual transactions.

name: Higgsfield
description: AI video reasoning engine for social media marketers
investors: Accel, GFT Ventures, Menlo Ventures, BroadLight Capital
thesis: $1.3B valuation, $200M ARR. Application-layer play integrating 3rd-party models. 11M+ users, 85% social media marketers. Founder ex-Snap GenAI lead.
